title: CustomEmoji methods: get, changes, set, query, queryChanges + fixture tests
description:
Implement CustomEmoji methods in methods/misc.rs:
- CustomEmoji/get: id, spaceId, shortCode, blobId, createdBy, createdAt
- CustomEmoji/changes
- CustomEmoji/set: create (upload emoji image as blob first), destroy
- CustomEmoji/query: filter by spaceId, shortCode prefix
- CustomEmoji/queryChanges: new per IMPROVEMENTS.md §8 — enables efficient local emoji cache via query + queryChanges pattern
- Fixture tests for all five methods

Fixture files: tests/fixtures/custom_emoji_*.json
